details.IncidentDetail: "[18] RP GOT HOME AROUND 1930 / UNLOADED A NEW GATE HE BOUGHT - DROVE THE TRK TO FRNT OF HOUSE AND UNLOADED WOOD // HAD DINNER - THEN GOT UP AROUND 0345 TO PEE AND TRK WAS STILL THERE - THEN WOKE UP AT 0700 HRS AND TRK WAS GONE -- DECIDED TO DRIVE AROUND THE AREA AND NOTICED A WHITE TRK IN A DITCH MATCHING HIS VEH"
"[17] RP IS 97 W/ VEH IN BLK MITZ OUTLANDER"
"[16] RP GOT IN HIS VEH AND STARTED DRVNG AROUND - JUST BOUGHT A HOUSE - 5463 HANKINS RD "
"[15] RP WOKE UP AT 0700 HRS AND VEH WAS GONE "
"[6] RP WENT LOOKING FOR VEH THIS MORNING BEFORE REPORTING IT AND FOUND IT IN DITCH "
"[5] VEH IS REGISTERED TO RPS BROTHER"
"[2] LOCATED VEH IN DITCH LOOKS LIKE IT TCD INTO TREE"
"[32] 35-S4 VIA LL // NEG LN FOR JOAQUIN"
"[31] REDD CC INQ VIA LL LN ON JOAQUIN "
"[29] RD COMM UNABLE TO GET II 917 TO POPULATE/ OPENED VIA INCIDENT EDITOR"
